paper_evaluations.title: Effect of Bougie Use on First-Attempt Success in Tracheal Intubations: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.

1.reason: Identified as systematic review/meta-analysis in header and title area.

2.reason: Structured abstract with background, methods, results, conclusions provided.

3.reason: Background and Importance sections describe rationale in context of existing knowledge.

4.reason: Explicit objective stated in 'Goals of This Investigation'.

5.reason: Eligibility criteria section specifies inclusion/exclusion and subgroups.

6.reason: Lists databases with date last searched (June 15, 2023).

9.reason: One extractor with second reviewer cross-check; standardized form used.

20d.reason: Sensitivity analysis excluding BOUGIE trial reported.

21.reason: Funnel plot asymmetry assessment reported in Appendix E4.

23a.reason: Discussion compares findings with prior meta-analyses.

23c.reason: Review limitations discussed (inability to do subgroup by experience, etc.).

23d.reason: Implications for practice and future research discussed.

24b.reason: Protocol available on PROSPERO; mentioned as registered there.
